ui.panel.home.editor.title: Edit Overview page
ui.panel.home.editor.description: Configure your Overview page display preferences.
ui.panel.home.editor.personalize_descrip: Customize the top of your Overview page.
ui.panel.home.editor.suggested_entities_: Show entities you use often alongside your favorites.
Your favorites already fill the section. Remove a favorite to make room for suggestions.
ui.panel.home.editor.save_failed: Failed to save Overview page configuration
ui.panel.home.editor.areas_hint: You can rearrange your floors and areas in the order that best represents your house on the {areas_page}.
ui.panel.home.editor.welcome_message_hel: Show the personalized greeting at the top of your overview page.
ui.panel.home.editor.summaries_descripti: Customize the summaries of your Overview page.
ui.panel.home.editor.shortcut.label: Label
ui.panel.home.new_overview_dialog.title: Welcome to your new overview
ui.panel.home.new_overview_dialog.descri: The overview dashboard has been redesigned to give you a better experience managing your smart home.
ui.panel.home.new_overview_dialog.automa: Your devices are now automatically organized by area and floor.
ui.panel.home.new_overview_dialog.favori: Pin your most used entities to the top for quick access.
ui.panel.home.new_overview_dialog.existi: Your manual dashboards are still available in the sidebar. Miss the old format? You can create a new dashboard using the "Overview (legacy)" template in {dashboard_settings} and set it as default.
ui.panel.home.banner.welcome_message: Welcome to the new overview dashboard.
